name.ja: <ruby>無垢なる芸術<rt>アルス＝マグナ</rt></ruby>－「<ruby>幻創の賢者<rt>フィロソフィルム</rt></ruby>」

text.en: Target up to 3 "Ars Magna" monsters in your field and/or GY; banish them, then you can negate the effects of up to that many other face-up cards on the field until the end of this turn. You can banish this card from your GY; return 1 "Power Patron" Link Monster from your GY into the Extra Deck, then you can Special Summon it. You can only use 1 "Ars Magna - "Philosophirum"" effect per turn, and only once that turn.
